name: agent-screens
description: Local-first macOS screenshot attachments for AI coding agents.

scripts.check: node --check bin/agent-screens.mjs && node --check extensions/screenshotter/index.js && node --check scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node --check scripts/quality-check.mjs && node --check scripts/model-quality-check.mjs && node --check scripts/text-scale-eval.mjs && npm run test
